mapper.insert: insert ignore into tb_notice (notice_number, notice_title, contract_method, amount, agency, region, demand_agency) values (#{notice_number}, #{notice_title}, #{contract_method}, #{amount}, #{agency}, #{region}, #{demand_agency})
mapper.select: SELECT n.*, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.entity_value SEPARATOR ', ') AS entity_value, -- DISTINCT를 추가하여 중복 파일명 제거 GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.file_name SEPARATOR ',') AS file_name, -- DISTINCT를 추가하여 중복 URL 제거 GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.file_url SEPARATOR ',') AS file_url FROM tb_notice n LEFT JOIN tb_notice_entity e ON n.notice_number = e.notice_number GROUP BY n.notice_id;
